message:
fix(session): delete sidecar directory when trashing session files

The session deletion path now removes the v2 sidecar directory (if it
exists) before deleting the main session file. Previously, orphaned
sidecar directories could accumulate when sessions were deleted via
the trash command, since only the primary .jsonl file was targeted.

The sidecar is removed using the same trash command when available,
falling back to fs::remove_dir_all if the trash utility doesn't
support directory arguments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
